elements.text:
State
- materialized: loan,
balance
- primitives: Event, Bill,
Transaction.
elements.originalText:
State
- materialized: loan, balance

elements.text:
Viewer
- overview
- charts
- split by person
elements.originalText:
Viewer
- overview
- charts
- split by person

elements.text:
Queries:
    - API Entities
        Person
        Loan, Balance - evolve over time
        Event, Bill, Transaction - primitives,
immutable.
        EventModification - meta, from the stream
editor.
   
- All Entities: 
    - Tags, recent/ future events modifying this 
 - Events
    - Type (Sys vs User), Kind, Date added,
pointer to lineage (if user generated). 
- Loan
    - upcoming payemnt splits
    - interest paid thus far.
    - remaining principal.
- Balance
    - how much is owed
- Bill
    - who it was paid for, who paid it, amount
- Transaction
    - to, from, etc.
elements.originalText:
Queries:
    - API Entities
        Person
        Loan, Balance - evolve over time
        Event, Bill, Transaction - primitives, immutable.
        EventModification - meta, from the stream editor.
   
- All Entities: 
    - Tags, recent/ future events modifying this 
 - Events
    - Type (Sys vs User), Kind, Date added, pointer to lineage (if user generated). 
- Loan
    - upcoming payemnt splits
    - interest paid thus far.
    - remaining principal.
- Balance
    - how much is owed
- Bill
    - who it was paid for, who paid it, amount
- Transaction
    - to, from, etc.

elements.text:
Persistence
- true persistence is only needed for the stream and their modifications.
- the state is a function of (stream, timestamp). 
- State(stream, t + 1) = applyEvent(State(stream, t), event@t + 1)

would be cool to figure out how to determine which entities need to be updated, following a
delta.
elements.originalText:

- true persistence is only needed for the stream and their modifications.
- the state is a function of (stream, timestamp).
